# Clayton Cuteri for U.S. Congress
# Write-In Candidate, South Carolina Congressional District 1 (SC-01)
# American Congress Party
# November 3, 2026 General Election

## About
Clayton A. Cuteri is a write-in candidate for U.S. House of Representatives, South Carolina District 1 (SC-01), in the November 3, 2026 general election. He is the Secretary General of the American Congress Party (ACP), a national third-party organization. His platform includes 13 policy priorities drawn from his book "America Reimagined."

## Key Information
- Candidate: Clayton A. Cuteri
- Office: U.S. House of Representatives, SC-01
- Party: American Congress Party (ACP)
- Election: November 3, 2026
- Status: Write-in candidate
- Website: https://writeincuteri.com
- Committee: Cuteri for Americans
- District: Charleston (partial), Berkeley, Dorchester (partial), Beaufort, Colleton (partial), Jasper counties

## Pages
- Home: https://writeincuteri.com/
- How to Write In: https://writeincuteri.com/write-in/
- SC-01 Problems: https://writeincuteri.com/problems/
- Priorities/Solutions: https://writeincuteri.com/policies/
- About Clayton: https://writeincuteri.com/about/
- Get Involved: https://writeincuteri.com/get-involved/
- Donate: https://writeincuteri.com/donate/
- Media: https://writeincuteri.com/press/
- Privacy: https://writeincuteri.com/privacy/
- Accessibility: https://writeincuteri.com/accessibility/

## 13 Policy Priorities
1. Free Food for All Americans
2. Free Medication
3. Free Education
4. Clean Food, Clean Water
5. Return to Gold Standard
6. No Federal Income Tax
7. Open Books (Government Transparency)
8. Stop Endless Wars
9. Affordable Housing
10. End Homelessness
11. Honor First Responders & Veterans
12. Energy Independence
13. Lowcountry Resilience (SC-01 specific: coastal insurance reform)

## Top SC-01 Issues
- Coastal insurance crisis (premiums doubling, carriers leaving)
- Housing affordability (median prices doubled in a decade)
- Military family support (Joint Base Charleston)
- Two-party system failure
- Prescription drug costs for retirees
- Working-class wage stagnation
- Lowcountry environmental protection
- Property tax burden on fixed-income residents

## Contact
- General: info@writeincuteri.com
- Media inquiries: Submit form at https://writeincuteri.com/press/
- Party website: https://americancongressparty.com
